title: calycodaphne cupularis
intro: Calycodaphne cupularis is a plant species belonging to the genus Calycodaphne, which is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calycodaphne cupularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are prepared by drying and crushing the leaves or using them in a decoction to harness its medicinal benefits.
